name: Player Block Placement
desc: Player places a block or uses an item. Can also be used for empty-hand interactions (e.g., pressing buttons).

fields.name: position
fields.desc: Position where the block/item is used

fields.name: placedBlockDirection
fields.desc: Face of the target block (0-5). 255 if no block face targeted.

fields.name: facingX/Y/Z
fields.desc: Cursor position on block face (0-1). Present when direction != 255.

implementation.overview: C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement is the complementary packet to C07. It's sent when the player right-clicks with an item. The packet carries: BlockPos, direction (0-5 face or 255 for no target), ItemStack in hand, and cursor position (faceX/Y/Z). The autoblock technique sends C08 with invalid position (-1,-1,-1, 255, 0,0,0) to start blocking without placing a block, which makes it critical for combat modules.

modules.name: Autoblock (Block-hitting)
modules.purpose: Starts blocking with a sword. Paired with C07 RELEASE_USE_ITEM to create the block-hitting cycle.
modules.how_it_works: Sends C08 with BlockPos(-1,-1,-1), direction 255, held item, cursor all 0. The server treats this as a block placement attempt on nothing, which for swords triggers the blocking state.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket. Invalid position (-1,-1,-1, 255) is universal for autoblock/C08 NoSlow.
implementation.client_variations: Tenacity 6.0: Autoblock with -1,-1,-1. Flux B39.11: Autoblock + NoSlow same pattern. Monsoon 3.0-A6: Scaffold manipulates facing values.
